evals.prompt: Give me a cheatsheet for cogni-trends
evals.expected_output: Generates a formatted reference card with commands (/scout, /report, /tips-status), core concepts (TIPS framework, Trendradar, Handlungsfelder), data model, common patterns, and related plugins

evals.prompt: What plugins are available for cheatsheets?
evals.expected_output: Lists all available insight-wave plugins with one-line descriptions, asks which one the user wants

evals.prompt: Quick reference for the portfolio plugin
evals.expected_output: Generates a cheatsheet for cogni-portfolio covering IS/DOES/MEANS, commands, TAM/SAM/SOM, and related plugins (cogni-consult, cogni-marketing, cogni-sales)
